data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of provider visibility into which version was completed. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that the system allows providers to see which version of the intake form was completed for each booking. While the linked use case mentions that staff can see which patient completed which version, there is no concrete evidence or API reads provided to substantiate this claim, leading to a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence confirming that providers can see which version of the intake form was completed for each booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
